original_statement: what is the 2008 status of tom tancredo?
mutated_statement: what is the 2008 status of the candidate who must be both elected and unelected?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Proper-name→descriptive paraphrase + Contradiction insertion: Proper name "tom tancredo" replaced by a vague descriptive relative clause "the candidate who must be both elected and unelected" | Added modal "must be" imposing necessity (no modal originally) | Introduced logical contradiction "both elected and unelected" (tom tancredo → the candidate who must be both elected and unelected)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键信息识别：agent在judge_thought中明确将“both elected and unelected”解释为“既作为incumbent又出现在党派候选人列中”，并列举实例且结论为2008年状态为“re-election”；在iteration日志中执行了simple_query（参数“re-election”，置信度1.0），未拒绝或询问澄清。agent没有修正原始矛盾为可解问题，也未忽视矛盾，而是通过对表格语义的逻辑重解释将矛盾合理化，从而直接给出基于数据的答案，符合“通过逻辑/事实解释使矛盾成立”的分类标准。
